articles.title: French man charged with locking son in van for more than a year
articles.description: The boy was found malnourished, naked, lying next to human excrement and unable to walk, the prosecutor said.

topStories.title: YouTube Premium gets pricier as subscription costs rise in the US – Here's how much you have to pay now
topStories.description: YouTube has raised Premium subscription prices in the US, increasing costs for individual and family plans. The move comes amid wider streaming price hikes, though the platform has denied reports of longer unskippable ads.

topStories.description: Reacting to the oft-repeated Trinamool charge that the Election Commission favours the BJP, Mr Shah said the allegation is a ploy by Ms Banerjee to garner what he called sympathy votes.

dailyNews.title: France to ditch Windows for Linux to reduce reliance on US tech
dailyNews.description: France's move to ditch Windows for Linux is its latest effort to reduce its reliance on American tech giants.

dailyNews.title: Was Trump ready to fire Tulsi Gabbard over Iran war testimony? Report claims Roger Stone intervened

dailyNews.title: Teens suspected of murdering congressional intern linked by DNA on shell casings, prosecutors say

dailyNews.title: Bryson DeChambeau not pleased with 3D-printed club question after eventful day at Augusta National
dailyNews.description: Bryson DeChambeau struggled in the first round of the Masters with a 4-over 76, then gave a blunt response when asked about his custom 3D-printed 5-iron.

dailyNews.title: Coco Gauff ends social media hiatus to clap back at critics of her natural hair in latest ad
dailyNews.description: Coco Gauff responded to negative comments about her natural hair in a Miu Miu ad, saying she won't apologize and encouraging others to embrace their hair.

dailyNews.title: Chicago suburb locals hope reparations addresses 'affordability pressures' as Black population dwindles
dailyNews.description: Evanston, Illinois has paid out millions in reparations to Black residents, but some locals say the $25,000 payments aren't enough to address decades of housing discrimination.

dailyNews.title: Vance says he is positive about Iran talks but Trump is still slamming Tehran
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance appears positive about talks with Iran in Pakistan, but President Trump remains frustrated about Tehran's control over the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe and Imtiaz Tyab report.

dailyNews.title: Farmers react to high gas prices as Trump's Iran war rages on
dailyNews.description: Farmers across America are grappling with soaring fuel prices as the war in Iran impacts energy costs. CBS News' Lana Zak reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Artemis II astronauts "modern-day pioneers" in live conversation
dailyNews.description: President Trump praised the crew of NASA's Artemis II mission in a brief chat late Monday, saying they had "inspired the entire world" after they looped around the moon in a record-breaking voyage.

dailyNews.title: A mother mourning the son she lost in the Iran war says she told Trump: 'Go get 'em'
dailyNews.description: More than a month after her son, Maj. Cody Khork, died in the Iran war, Donna Burhans has found a routine that helps her cope.

dailyNews.title: Hunter Biden open to cage match with Trump sons
dailyNews.description: Hunter Biden open to cage match with Trump sons

dailyNews.title: Trump Attacks Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly Over Iran War Criticism
dailyNews.description: In a lengthy social media post, the president attacked Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly and others in starkly personal terms. He also criticized the editorial board of The Wall Street Journal.

dailyNews.title: Trump Posts Graphic Video of Deadly Attack and Rails Against Haitian Immigrants
dailyNews.description: The man seen beating a woman is from Haiti and faces a murder charge in Florida, officials said. President Trump has fought to end protections for Haitian immigrants.

dailyNews.title: Judge Declines to Order Trump Administration to Adjust Somali Deportation Policies
dailyNews.description: Acknowledging that the government may have recently stepped up the pace of removal proceedings, a federal judge wrote that he could not immediately intervene.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Returns to Court for Yet Another Tariff Lawsuit
dailyNews.description: States and small businesses challenged the 10 percent tax on many imports that President Trump imposed after the Supreme Court struck down a previous slate of tariffs.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not Associated With Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse and was not a victim of his. She called for a congressional hearing for his victims.

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Palantir with stock down 15% this week as Iran conflict drags on
dailyNews.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Michael Burry says he's still betting against Palantir after Trump post boosts stock
dailyNews.description: The investor of the "Big Short" fame said he continues to hold long-dated put options on the artificial intelligence software firm.
